name: CSMM-7DtD
description:
This Docker will install and download CSMM for 7DtD (CatalysmsServerManager).
It's a powerfull Server Manager with Server automation, Discord notifications, High ping kicker, Country ban, Player tracking, Ingame commands, Economy system, Discord integration, Support ticket system, Server analytics,... for 7DtD.

UPDATE NOTICE: Simply set the 'Force Update' to 'true' and restart the container (don't forget to turn it off after the update).

ports.name: Web Port
ports.description: Please note that you should reverse proxy the server trough nginx, apache or any other reverse proxy software to your Hostname as filled in above.

ports.name: Maria DB Port
ports.description: Only needed if you want to connect to the database.

variables.name: Hostname
variables.description: Must be in this exact format: 'https://www.server.org' (without quotes, no path or locations allowed only subdomains and with no trailing '/').

variables.name: Steam API Key
variables.description: Steam API Key goes here (you can get it from: https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey).

variables.name: Dicord Bot Token
variables.description: Your Discord Bot Token (you can get it from here: https://discordapp.com/developers/applications)

variables.name: Discord Client Secret
variables.description: Your Discord Client Secret (you can get it from here: https://discordapp.com/developers/applications)

variables.name: Discord Client ID
variables.description: Your Discord Client ID (you can get it from here: https://discordapp.com/developers/applications)

variables.name: Database Backup Interval
variables.description: Specify the database backup interval in seconds (saved to the ../Database/7dtd.sql).

variables.name: Force Update
variables.description: Set to 'true' to force an update.

variables.name: CSMM Download URL
variables.description: Only change if you are know what you are doing.
